This directory vendors the LetsBeRational source used for `volfi` benchmark reproduction.

Upstream source:
`www.jaeckel.org/LetsBeRational.7z`

Author:
Peter Jaeckel

License notice:
The original source files in this directory contain the upstream copyright and permission notice. Keep those notices intact when copying or modifying these files.

Purpose in this repository:
- build `bench/bench_lbr_compare.cpp`
- reproduce the published `volfi` versus LetsBeRational performance comparison from a public checkout
